description: Generic Events System - Replace sickness_episodes with a unified events table supporting categories (sick, gym, social, travel, other) displayed on the chart

userStories.title: Event categories constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared mapping of event categories to colors and labels so the chart and UI stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/lib/event-categories.ts` exporting `EVENT_CATEGORIES` array and helper functions
Each category object: { key: string, label: string (French), color: string (CSS rgb) }
Categories: sick (Maladie, rgb(239,68,68)), gym (Sport, rgb(59,130,246)), social (Social, rgb(168,85,247)), travel (Voyage, rgb(245,158,11)), other (Autre, rgb(156,163,175))
Export `CATEGORY_KEYS` array of valid keys for validation
Export helper `getCategoryByKey(key: string)` returning the category object or undefined
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is a pure constants/utility file with no DB or UI dependencies. Other stories import from it.

userStories.title: Events table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an events table in the database to store all user events.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `eventsTable` to `src/server/db/schema.ts`: id (serial PK), user_id (integer FK to users), category (varchar, not null), name (varchar, nullable), date (date, not null), end_date (date, nullable), created_at (timestamp, default now)
Add index on user_id
Add index on date
Do NOT remove `sicknessEpisodesTable` yet (migration handled separately)
Generate Drizzle migration successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep sicknessEpisodesTable in schema for now — it will be removed after data migration.

userStories.title: Events tRPC router (CRUD)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create, list, update, and delete events so I can track my life events.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/server/trpc/routers/events.ts` with `list`, `create`, `update`, `delete` procedures
All procedures use `protectedProcedure`
`list` returns all events for current user, ordered by date desc
`create` accepts { category, name?, date, endDate? }, validates category against CATEGORY_KEYS from event-categories.ts, inserts row, returns created event
`update` accepts { id, category, name?, date, endDate? }, validates category, checks ownership, updates row
`delete` accepts { id }, checks ownership, deletes row
If endDate is provided, validate endDate >= date
Register router in root router as `events` (keep `sickness` router for now)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep sickness router registered temporarily — it will be removed when the UI is swapped.

userStories.title: Events panel UI (replaces SicknessPanel)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a panel to manage all my events with category selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/events/events-panel.tsx` component titled 'Mes événements'
Add event form: category selector (shadcn Select with colored dot per category), optional name input, date picker, optional end date picker
Event list shows all events with colored category badge, date(s), name if set, and edit/delete buttons
Edit inline (same pattern as current sickness panel edit)
Delete with confirmation dialog
Time Machine button on each event (reuse existing TimeMachineDialog)
Stats section for sick-category events only (reuse existing SicknessStats logic)
Replace SicknessPanel with EventsPanel in page.tsx
Remove sickness router from root router, delete `src/server/trpc/routers/sickness.ts`
Remove `src/components/sickness/sickness-panel.tsx`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use shadcn Select component (add with `./node_modules/.bin/shadcn add select` if not present). Reuse patterns from sickness-panel.tsx.

userStories.title: Display events on chart
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my events on the wastewater chart so I can visually correlate them with sickness.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace sickness-specific chart logic in wastewater-chart.tsx with generic event rendering
Fetch events via `trpc.events.list` instead of `trpc.sickness.list`
Events with end_date: render as ReferenceArea band in category color (same opacity pattern as current sickness bands)
Single-day events (no end_date): render as ReferenceLine vertical marker in category color
One legend entry per category that has events in the visible range, grouped under 'Personnel'
Each category toggleable via legend (extend hiddenKeys with category-based keys like `event_sick`, `event_gym`, etc.)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Extend the existing sickness band logic. Use EVENT_CATEGORIES for colors. dateToISOWeek already exists for date-to-week conversion.

userStories.title: Migrate sickness data and drop old table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to migrate existing sickness_episodes data to the events table and clean up the old table.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a Drizzle migration that: INSERT INTO events (user_id, category, date, end_date, created_at) SELECT user_id, 'sick', start_date, end_date, created_at FROM sickness_episodes
Migration then drops the sickness_episodes table
Remove `sicknessEpisodesTable` from `src/server/db/schema.ts`
Generate Drizzle migration successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This runs LAST because all code must already reference eventsTable instead of sicknessEpisodesTable. The custom SQL migration should be created manually in the drizzle/ folder if drizzle-kit cannot express it.
